content: {"name": "Ironbark Behemoth", "mana_cost": "{5}{G}{G}", "cmc": 7, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "Its footsteps shake the earth, and its roar silences the forest. Even the ancient oaks bow before its might.", "power": "6", "toughness": "4", "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Fixed the power level issue by increasing the mana cost to 7 and adjusting toughness to 4. Now P+T = 10, which equals CMC+3 (7+3=10), meeting the common creature guideline exactly. This 7-mana 6/4 with trample represents Green's big creatures at common while staying within New World Order complexity limits. The high cost ensures it's a late-game threat that won't dominate early games."}
